chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 104 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.1191/2024 (R/Surety) 22.03.2024 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed A. Puno, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application is filed by applicant Irfanullah seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Abdul Fatah, who, on 20.02.2024, was granted protective bail for a period of five days subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original Special Savings Certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated time and obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from the trial Court’s order dated 26.02.2024, annexed with this application. Learned Additional Prosecutor General has extended his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
